trans-unit.source: Browser profile '{0}' matched multiple Chromium profiles under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name instead.
trans-unit.target: Browser profile '{0}' matched multiple Chromium profiles under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name instead.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the requested profile, {1} is the user data directory.

trans-unit.source: Cannot resolve the isolated browser user data directory because the AppHost path identifier is not available. Use '{0}' user data mode or run from a configured AppHost.
trans-unit.target: Cannot resolve the isolated browser user data directory because the AppHost path identifier is not available. Use '{0}' user data mode or run from a configured AppHost.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the Isolated user data mode value.

trans-unit.source: (default)
trans-unit.target: (default)

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty browser value.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty browser value.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty profile value.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser configuration resolved an empty profile value.

trans-unit.source: Endpoint '{0}' for resource '{1}' has not been allocated yet.
trans-unit.target: Endpoint '{0}' for resource '{1}' has not been allocated yet.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the endpoint name, {1} is the resource name.

trans-unit.source: Chromium profile metadata in '{0}' is invalid while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Chromium profile metadata in '{0}' is invalid while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the Local State file path, {1} is the requested profile.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser configuration value '{0}' is not a valid '{1}'. Expected '{2}' or '{3}'.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser configuration value '{0}' is not a valid '{1}'. Expected '{2}' or '{3}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the configured value, {1} is the user data mode configuration key, {2} and {3} are valid enum values.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before the debug endpoint metadata was written to '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before the debug endpoint metadata was written to '{1}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the browser process exit code, {1} is the DevToolsActivePort file path.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before reporting its process id.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser process exited with code {0} before reporting its process id.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the browser process exit code.

trans-unit.source: Browser profile '{0}' was not found under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name (for example 'Default' or 'Profile 1') or a browser profile name from Chromium's profile metadata.
trans-unit.target: Browser profile '{0}' was not found under '{1}'. Specify the profile directory name (for example 'Default' or 'Profile 1') or a browser profile name from Chromium's profile metadata.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the requested profile, {1} is the user data directory.

trans-unit.source: Tracked browser configuration set '{0}' to '{1}' while '{2}' is '{3}'. Profiles can only be selected when '{2}' is '{4}'.
trans-unit.target: Tracked browser configuration set '{0}' to '{1}' while '{2}' is '{3}'. Profiles can only be selected when '{2}' is '{4}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the profile configuration key, {1} is the configured profile, {2} is the user data mode configuration key, {3} is Isolated, {4} is Shared.

trans-unit.source: Resource '{0}' does not have an HTTP or HTTPS endpoint. Browser logs require an endpoint to navigate to.
trans-unit.target: Resource '{0}' does not have an HTTP or HTTPS endpoint. Browser logs require an endpoint to navigate to.

trans-unit.source: A tracked browser is already running for user data directory '{0}' with profile '{1}'. The requested profile is '{2}'. Close the existing tracked browser session or use isolated user data mode.
trans-unit.target: A tracked browser is already running for user data directory '{0}' with profile '{1}'. The requested profile is '{2}'. Close the existing tracked browser session or use isolated user data mode.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the user data directory, {1} is the existing profile, {2} is the requested profile.

trans-unit.source: Unable to locate browser '{0}'. Specify an installed Chromium-based browser or an explicit executable path.
trans-unit.target: Unable to locate browser '{0}'. Specify an installed Chromium-based browser or an explicit executable path.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the requested browser name or path.

trans-unit.source: Unable to read Chromium profile metadata from '{0}' while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Unable to read Chromium profile metadata from '{0}' while resolving browser profile '{1}'.
trans-unit.note: {0} is the Local State file path, {1} is the requested profile.

trans-unit.source: Browser user data directory '{0}' was not found.
trans-unit.target: Browser user data directory '{0}' was not found.

trans-unit.source: Anonymous volumes cannot be read-only.
trans-unit.target: Анонимные тома не могут быть доступны только для чтения.

trans-unit.source: Bind mounts must specify an absolute path.
trans-unit.target: Привязка подключений должна указывать абсолютный путь.

trans-unit.source: Bind mounts must specify a source path.
trans-unit.target: Привязка подключений должна указывать исходный путь.

trans-unit.source: Application orchestrator dependency check returned an error: {0}
trans-unit.target: Проверка зависимостей оркестратора приложения вернула ошибку: {0}

trans-unit.source: Newer version of the Aspire.Hosting.AppHost package is required to run the application. Ensure you are referencing at least version '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Для запуска приложения требуется более новая версия пакета Aspire.Hosting.AppHost. Убедитесь, что вы ссылаетесь по крайней мере на версию "{0}".

trans-unit.source: Installation instructions
trans-unit.target: Инструкции по установке

trans-unit.source: Missing command
trans-unit.target: Отсутствует команда

trans-unit.source: Resource '{0}' has a persistent lifetime but the AppHost project does not have user secrets configured. Generated parameter values (such as passwords) may change on each restart, causing persistent containers to be recreated. Run 'aspire secret set' to initialize user secrets.
trans-unit.target: Ресурс "{0}" имеет постоянный срок службы, но в проекте AppHost не настроены пользовательские секреты. Сгенерированные значения параметров (например, пароли) могут изменяться при каждом перезапуске, из-за чего постоянные контейнеры будут пересоздаваться. Выполните команду "aspire secret set" для инициализации секретов пользователей.

trans-unit.source: Required command '{0}' was not found on PATH or at the specified location.
trans-unit.target: Требуемая команда "{0}" не найдена в PATH или в указанном расположении.

trans-unit.source: Required command '{0}' was not found on PATH or at the specified location. For installation instructions, see: {1}
trans-unit.target: Требуемая команда "{0}" не найдена в PATH или в указанном расположении. Инструкции по установке: {1}

trans-unit.source: Command '{0}' validation failed: {1}
trans-unit.target: Сбой проверки команды "{0}": {1}

trans-unit.source: Command '{0}' validation failed: {1}. For installation instructions, see: {2}
trans-unit.target: Сбой проверки команды "{0}": {1}. Инструкции по установке: {2}

trans-unit.source: Resource '{0}' may fail to start: {1}
trans-unit.target: Ресурс "{0}" может не запуститься: {1}
